tools.name: tool_notes_chat
tools.description: Personal notes assistant — create, read, update, delete, search, pin, tag notes; create, rename, delete, list folders; move notes between folders; manage trash (restore, empty, permanent delete); full-text search across notes. NOT for emails, SQL databases, chat messages, tasks, or legal cases.

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_notes
tools.description: Refresh note statistics: total count, pinned, trash, recent titles.
